infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vela uses your camera to capture weekly face scans using AR alignment. Photos are stored only on your device.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Vela uses Face ID hardware for precise face alignment measurements.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Vela saves your comparison photos to your camera roll when you choose to share them.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Vela reads sleep, heart rate variability, and cycle data from Apple Health to surface gentle correlations with your face metrics. Raw values stay on your device.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Vela uses your microphone for on-device voice journaling. Audio never leaves your device.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Vela transcribes your diary entries on-device. Speech is processed locally.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Allow tracking to help us understand which marketing channels bring people who genuinely benefit from Vela. Declining still gives you full access.

plugins.userTrackingPermission: Allow tracking to help us understand which marketing channels bring people who genuinely benefit from Vela. Declining still gives you full access.
